goal: Compare the entry individual paid tier monthly price (billed monthly, USD) of three design/creative SaaS tools — Figma (Professional/full seat), Canva Pro, and Adobe Express Premium — and determine which is the cheapest and its price.
expected: Adobe Express Premium is the cheapest at $9.99/month, below Figma Professional ($16/month) and Canva Pro ($18/month), with no ties, as of 2026-06-18.
answer:
# Pricing Comparison: Figma Professional vs. Canva Pro vs. Adobe Express Premium
*(Individual paid tier, billed monthly, USD)*

| Tool | Plan Name | Monthly Price (billed monthly) |
|---|---|---|
| **Figma** | Professional (full seat) | **$16.00 / mo** |
| **Canva** | Pro | **$12.99–$18.00 / mo** ⚠️ |
| **Adobe Express** | Premium | **$9.99 / mo** |

---

## Price Details

### 1. 🎨 Figma Professional — $16.00/month
Figma's Professional full-seat tier costs **$16/month** when billed monthly [1]. It includes unlimited files and projects, team-wide design libraries, advanced Dev Mode inspection, and 3,000 AI credits per month.

### 2. 🖌️ Canva Pro — $12.99–$18.00/month ⚠️
This is the most uncertain figure. Multiple sources conflict:
- **$12.99/month** — cited by Miracamp (described as current 2026 USA pricing) [3]
- **$15.00/month** — cited by itopvpn/Orb Billing [4]
- **$18.00/month** — cited by Style Factory (updated May 2026) [2], suggesting a possible recent price increase

The Canva official pricing page was blocked during this research, so the exact current price could not be directly verified. The most recently updated third-party source (Style Factory, May 2026) lists **$18/month**, but other sources still show $12.99.

### 3. ✍️ Adobe Express Premium — $9.99/month
Adobe Express Premium costs **$9.99/month** when billed monthly with no annual commitment [5][6]. It includes 250 generative AI credits, 100GB cloud storage, 200M+ Adobe Stock assets, and social scheduling tools.

---

## 🏆 Winner: Adobe Express Premium at **$9.99/month**

**Adobe Express Premium is the cheapest** of the three at **$9.99/month** (billed monthly) — significantly less than Figma's $16/month and Canva Pro's $12.99–$18/month, regardless of which Canva price is current.

> ⚠️ **Caveat on Canva Pro pricing:** Third-party sources conflict on Canva's current monthly price. Canva's official pricing page was inaccessible during this research. Verify the latest price at [canva.com/pricing](https://www.canva.com/pricing) before making a purchasing decision.

Toolrom — Adobe Express Premium at $9.99/month billed monthly, no annual commitment
Photutorial — Adobe Express Premium at $9.99/month billed monthly in USD

However, the winner (Adobe Express Premium) is clear regardless of which Canva price is accurate.
